subcodes.first_line: In this day the education of children and their protection is accounted as the most exalted of deeds in the sight of the All-Possessing Lord, though outwardly it may appear burdensome [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز تربیت اطفال و حفظ ایشان از سید اعمال نزد غنی متعال مذکور اگر چه در ظاهر زحمتست
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @education of children; moral education, @martyrs and martyrdom
